rules.cause: Device management enrollment bootstrap failed with missing local component/state (0x80070002).
anyMatches: device management could not be enabled
the system cannot find the file specified
recommendedActions: Verify Intune license + MDM user scope for the user.
Clear stale EnterpriseMgmt enrollment state and retry.

rules.cause: Connectivity, DNS, or proxy path blocked communication to Microsoft endpoints.
recommendedActions: Validate DNS and outbound access to required Microsoft endpoints.
Test from a known-good network without SSL interception.

rules.cause: Device is already enrolled/registered or has stale registration state.
recommendedActions: Clean duplicate device objects and retry.

rules.cause: Generic MDM enrollment failure from detected enrollment signals.
recommendedActions: Review Intune enrollment restrictions and user scope.
Check Entra sign-in logs around the failure timestamp.
